Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Sophia Aslami, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Ray Ach, parent and guardian ad litem for Minor: Tyler Ash, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $325,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $81,250.00 payable to Mary Alexander & Associates.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of: $38,004.40
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of: $25,000.00 to Kaiser California North c/o Gibson & Sharps, 9390 Bunsen Parkway, Suite 250. Louisville KY 40220
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: #144,254.00

A net balance of $180,745.60 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank Branch 04955 2100 Fillmore Street, San Francisco, CA 94115 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 17, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
